Description: Establishes the organization's overall approach to information security, roles, responsibilities, and commitment to protecting information assets.
Notes: Aligns to NIST CSF 2.0 GV.OC-01, GV.OC-03. Foundation policy for the security program.

Description: Defines the framework for identifying, assessing, and managing cybersecurity risks across the organization.
Notes: Aligns to GV.RM-01 through GV.RM-07. Includes risk appetite and tolerance statements.

Description: Establishes requirements for managing cybersecurity risks in the supply chain including vendor assessments and third-party oversight.
Notes: Aligns to GV.SC-01 through GV.SC-10. Covers vendor onboarding, monitoring, and offboarding.

Description: Defines requirements for identifying, inventorying, and managing hardware, software, and data assets throughout their lifecycle.
Notes: Aligns to ID.AM-01 through ID.AM-08. Includes asset classification and ownership requirements.

Description: Establishes requirements for managing logical and physical access to organizational systems, networks, and data.
Notes: Aligns to PR.AA-01 through PR.AA-06. Covers identity management, authentication, and access provisioning.

Description: Defines data classification levels and handling requirements for information at each level including storage, transmission, and disposal.
Notes: Aligns to PR.DS-01, PR.DS-02, PR.DS-10. Covers Confidential, Private, and Public classifications.

Description: Establishes requirements for cybersecurity awareness training for all staff, role-based training, and ongoing security education.
Notes: Aligns to PR.AT-01, PR.AT-02. Includes phishing simulation requirements and new hire training.

Description: Defines security requirements for infrastructure, network architecture, endpoint protection, and secure configuration of technology platforms.
Notes: Aligns to PR.PS-01 through PR.PS-06. Covers patch management, hardening standards, and network segmentation.

Description: Establishes requirements for backup, recovery, and continuity of technology services to maintain operational resilience.
Notes: Aligns to PR.IR-01, PR.IR-02. Covers backup verification, disaster recovery testing, and recovery time objectives.

Description: Defines requirements for ongoing monitoring of networks, systems, and assets to detect cybersecurity events and anomalies.
Notes: Aligns to DE.CM-01 through DE.CM-09. Covers SIEM, log management, and network monitoring requirements.

Description: Establishes requirements for identifying, evaluating, prioritizing, and remediating security vulnerabilities across the environment.
Notes: Aligns to DE.CM-08, RS.MI-02. Covers scanning frequency, severity-based SLAs, and exception handling.

Description: Defines processes for analyzing detected cybersecurity events to determine their nature, scope, and potential impact.
Notes: Aligns to DE.AE-02 through DE.AE-08. Covers event correlation, triage, and escalation criteria.

Description: Establishes the framework for responding to cybersecurity incidents including roles, communications, containment, and eradication procedures.
Notes: Aligns to RS.MA-01 through RS.MA-05, RS.AN-03, RS.CO-02. Includes tabletop exercise schedule.

Description: Defines procedures for recovering from cybersecurity incidents including restoration, communication, and post-incident review.
Notes: Aligns to RC.RP-01 through RC.RP-06, RC.CO-03, RC.CO-04. Covers recovery plans and lessons learned.

Description: Defines acceptable and prohibited uses of organizational information systems, networks, and data by employees and contractors.
Notes: Supports GV.OC-01. Covers internet use, email, BYOD, social media, and remote work requirements.

Description: Establishes requirements for collecting, processing, storing, and disposing of personally identifiable information in compliance with applicable regulations.
Notes: Aligns to GV.OC-02. Covers PII handling, consent, data subject rights, and breach notification.

Description: Defines requirements for managing changes to information systems, infrastructure, and configurations to prevent unauthorized or disruptive changes.
Notes: Aligns to PR.PS-05. Covers change request, review, approval, testing, and rollback procedures.

Description: Establishes requirements for the use of cryptographic controls to protect data confidentiality and integrity, and management of encryption keys.
Notes: Aligns to PR.DS-01, PR.DS-02. Covers encryption at rest, in transit, and key lifecycle management.

Description: Defines requirements for protecting physical facilities, equipment, and media from unauthorized access, damage, and interference.
Notes: Aligns to PR.AA-06, PR.PS-04. Covers facility access, visitor management, and equipment disposal.

Description: Defines cybersecurity roles, responsibilities, and authorities across the organization including management accountability and reporting structures.
Notes: Aligns to GV.RR-01 through GV.RR-04. Covers RACI matrix for security functions and board reporting.
